name: Norwegian Christmas Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and water, bring to a boil for 5 minutes.
2. Add 6 tablespoons flour and stir with a whisk. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before removing any excess fat.
3. Gradually add 1 1/4 cups flour and continue stirring until well combined.
4. Stir in heated milk while using an electric mixer to prevent lumps from forming.
5. Incorporate salt, beaten egg, and sugar into the mixture.
6. Pour the pudding into a crock pot, adding the skimmed fat over the top of the pudding along with additional sugar and cinnamon.
